pages.title: Enderman
pages.text: $(b)Speed:$() 5 | $(b)Special:$() Teleport$(br)Extremely fast and can teleport anywhere on the grid! They teleport adjacent to you and attack. Very hard to run from. Focus fire them down quickly.

pages.title: Blaze
pages.text: $(b)Speed:$() 2 | $(b)Range:$() 3 | $(b)Special:$() Fireball$(br)Hovering ranged attacker that shoots fireballs. The fireball deals area damage on impact. Try to close distance or use ranged weapons.

pages.title: Witch
pages.text: $(b)Speed:$() 2 | $(b)Range:$() 4 | $(b)Special:$() Potions$(br)Throws harmful potions from long range. Can poison, slow, or weaken you. High priority target - take her out before the debuffs stack up!

pages.title: Phantom
pages.text: $(b)Speed:$() 4 | $(b)Special:$() Swoop$(br)Flying enemy that swoops in from distance, deals damage, then retreats. Hard to pin down. Use ranged weapons or wait for it to come to you.
